characters.name: Alex Russo
characters.description:
Alex is artistic, fashionable, creative, rebellious, sarcastic, and quick-witted. She's known for her mischievous nature and laid-back attitude, often preferring to take shortcuts—especially when magic is involved. While she's clever and street-smart, she's not academically inclined and frequently relies on her wit rather than hard work to solve problems.
Despite her laziness and rule-breaking tendencies, Alex shows genuine affection for her family and friends. Her relationship withHarper Finklehighlights her caring side, as seen when she reveals her magical secret out of guilt in "Harper Knows". Similarly, her bond with her brothers—especially Justin—shows her growth over time, learning responsibility and compassion.
Alex's humor and rebellious streak make her a "lovable troublemaker." Though she's often selfish and manipulative, she's also brave, loyal, and capable of selflessness when it matters most. By adulthood inWizards Beyond Waverly Place, Alex matures into a responsible member of the Wizard Tribunal, showing that while she may never lose her sarcastic edge, she ultimately embraces her role as a protector of magical order. Although in the season three episode “Alex's Logo” while she is under a truth spell, it is revealed by Alex herself that the reason that she acts mean is simply because she wants to be liked and actually fears being hated.

characters.name: Alfred
characters.description: AlfredisMax's best friend. He is known to be smarter than Max. He and Max started a water business inSmarty Pants, even a dog business to give away a puppy for money. He appeared once again inBeware Wolfwhen he and Max wanted to buy cups on a chain. When Alex said to Max that Justin was dating a "dog", Alfred was right there and he didn't seem to think anything was wrong, which possibly hints that he knows ofwizardry.

characters.name: Alucard van Heusen
characters.description: Alucard van Heusenis a vampire, the husband ofCindy van Heusen, and father ofJuliet van Heusen. We first see Alucard in "Wizards vs. Vampires" in his sandwich shop,Late Nite Bite, whenJustincomes in to investigate the new sandwich. Alucard realizes that Justin works at theWaverly Sub Stationand there to steal their ideas. He later arrives at the substation, telling the Russos that making Justin play with hisdaughter'sfeelings was low, even for wizards. At first, he wouldn't allow Justin and Juliet to date but gave in after they begged him, and when his wife reminded him how they were young and in love once. InWizards vs. Vampires: Tasty Bites, Alex goes to Alucard and his wife to ask if they can get Juliet to stop making her family eat healthy but instead he gives Alex and Harper a job atLate Nite Bite. After they've started working for him, he tells them that the reason why Juliet is so healthy is that she is a young vampire and that they make humans eat healthy as it makes the blood taste better.

characters.name: Archie
characters.description: Archieis a character who appears as the secondary antagonist ofWizards of Waverly Place: The Movie. Archie is a skilled, but unlucky and sardonic illusionist and con artist, and serves as the comical foil of the movie. He was born a wizard, but lost to his older brother in their familyWizard Competition. He and Giselle constantly get in trouble with local authorities and try to convince the Russos to search for the "Stone of the Dreams", but fail due toJerry'sdistrust of them. However, after a time paradox caused byAlexthat could destroy the entire family, she andJustinhave no choice other than to find the object. During the movie, Archie serves as an assistant of Giselle, helping her due both to his crush on her and his own personal desires in getting the Stone. But despite his greediness, Archie proves to be much more good-natured than Giselle, and both remorseful, for going too far. Upset with Giselle's unfaithfulness, he stood up and got revenge over her by stealing the Stone from her and redeeming himself by giving it to Theresa, undoing all the incidents of the movie.

characters.name: Bella Bianchi
characters.description: Bella Bianchiis a recurring character in the Disney Channel Original SeriesWizards Beyond Waverly Place.[1]She is the daughter ofAnita Bianchi. She isMilo Russo's enemy and neighbor. She is portrayed by Eleanor Sweeney. Bella Bianchi is athletic, mean and sarcastic. Bella Bianchi was born sometime in the 2010s toAnita Bianchi. Bella Bianchi is athletic, mean and sarcastic.

characters.name: Brad Sherwood
characters.description: Bradley "Brad" Sherwoodis a student at Tribeca Prep. He is seen in "Potion Commotion" competing againstJustinto be the World Summit delegate. Brad believes "it's always about the schmoozing". He is portrayed byShane Lyons. Brad is introduced as Justin's rival, and a potential love interest forAlex. He is seen at theWaverly Sub Stationhelping outTheresawith a heavy box. Alex used to be interested in him, but he did not seem to reciprocate her feelings. Brad happens to be outside Waverly Sub Station whenMaxremoves the hat that is regulating his powers, and he notices that it starts snowing inside. He confronts Justin, Alex, and Max about it, and reluctantly accepts their story that it was just bad dandruff.

characters.name: Cab 804
characters.description: Taxi Alex Russo’s Driver Cab 804is the cabAlex Russowas born in. It is featured in "Taxi Dance" when it was going to be scrapped, but Alex accidentally brought it to life when she meant to fix it. Cab 804 is an old 1960sChecker Marathoncab and is yellow like all cabs inNew York. It has a black and white checkered strip printed on the side and a white sign on the top with 804 printed on it. It has a large silver front bumper and silver radiator. It also has a Canadian Rockies car freshener hanging from the rearview mirror.

characters.name: Carmela
characters.description: Carmelais the cousin ofJerry Russo. She's also awizardwho appears in the one-hour special,The Wizards Return: Alex vs. Alex. She is portrayed by Natalia Nogulich.

characters.name: Centaur Girl
characters.description: Centaur Girlwas a femalecentaurJustin took toWizTechprom. It is said that she has blonde hair and from the sandwich shop desk looks like a normal girl but has a body of a horse. She ate all the carrots from the sandwich shop, making them unable to serve carrot dishes for over a week. She was later mentioned inWestern Show. She has not made any appearances apart from the end ofBeware Wolf.

characters.name: Chase Riprock
characters.description: Chase Riprockis a famous beast tamer. He is portrayed by Nick Roux. In the episode "Beast Tamer",Chase keeps going afterAlexand eventually tries to kiss her. However, she turns him down after telling him that she has a boyfriend. In "Wizard of the Year", he came by and congratulated Alex on winning the award and gave her a hug. Later at the banquet he sat with Alex, where he tried to get Alex to let him stay with her by saying, "I'd better return to my table. Way, way, way over there. Across the room." Alex replied, "It's fine, just sit down," to which he smiled.Mason Greybeck, Alex's boyfriend, got mad when he saw Chase with Alex. He turned into awerewolfand attacked Chase.

characters.name: Chelsa
characters.description: Chelsa(Kristi Lauren) is a student atTribeca Prep. She appears in the episodeArt Teacherwhere she overhearsMax RussoaskJustinto sign a letter saying he has a fake disease named "mono-orangosis". She gives him a lot of sympathy until realizing the disease is fake. She is the niece ofMisty May Treanor.

characters.name: Cindy van Heusen
characters.description: Cindy van Heusenis a vampire, the wife ofAlucard van Heusen, and mother ofJuliet van Heusen. She and Alucard are the owners of the competing sandwich shop on Waverly Place, theLate Nite Bite, appearing in the four-part "Wizards vs. Vampires on Waverly Place" story arc at the end ofseason two. At first, they are opposed to the relationship between Juliet and Justin, but they eventually allow them to date each other. They didn't appear in the last 2 four-part episodes. They also called Alex "Oprah" in "Wizards vs. Vampires on Waverly Place" making every customer at the Late Nite Bite turn their heads to only see her.

characters.name: Clanton
characters.description: Superintendent Clantonis the main antagonist ofWestern Show. He came to checkTribeca Prepfor any problems and firedMr. Laritateand took his job. Later, he turned the school into the worst place ever. Mr. Laritate later got back at him with the help of theRussosand Clanton ran out of the office screaming. Presumably to match up with Mr. Laritate speaking primarily in western terms, he uses a large amount of boat wordplay and analogies.

characters.name: Cody Martin
characters.description: Cody Martin(born 1992) was a character from the Suite Life series, who guest starred onWizards of Waverly Place, in its feature-length crossover, Wizards on Deck with Hannah Montana. He is the twin brother of Zack Martin, the son of Carey and Kurt Martin and the maternal nephew of Martha. Cody had recently lived in the Tipton Hotel, which was located in Boston. The summer of 2008, saw he and his brother moving to the SS Tipton (The Suite Life on Deck) and stayed there for three years, until they graduated. He currently lives in New York City, with his now-future-wife, Bailey Pickett. Martin, during his time on the show, has made many friends, them being,Harper, Marcus, Bailey, Woody, London, Maddie, Jessica, Janice, Bob, Barbara, Raven, Rebecca, Stacie, Esteban and Arwin. Cody is portrayed by Cole Sprouse. Cody Martin was born in 1992 at 6:40 AM to Carey Martin. Cody's identical brother, Zack, was born 10 minutes before him at 6:30 AM.  Weeks after their birth, Carey traveled across the country with her two sons, before settling into the Tipton as seen in the first Suite Life episode, 'Hotel Hangout'. Cody and Zack had also moved schools a lot. Cody is seen as a nice and geek-sort-of teenager. He doesn't know how to socialise with others but tries to. When he is put in a nervous place, i.e, on a date or forced to tell the truth, he stammers but manages to do good in the end. Cody loves succeeding and hates people pulling him down. In a test, if he gains 90% or 99% instead of 100, he gets angry and selfish, and demands a re-count. Various cases see him not getting what he wants, angering him. Cody is a complete opposite to Zack, as Zack doesn't care about achieving that much.

When he is put in a nervous place, i.e, on a date or forced to tell the truth, he stammers but manages to do good in the end. Cody loves succeeding and hates people pulling him down. In a test, if he gains 90% or 99% instead of 100, he gets angry and selfish, and demands a re-count. Various cases see him not getting what he wants, angering him. Cody is a complete opposite to Zack, as Zack doesn't care about achieving that much.

characters.name: Conscience
characters.description: ConsciencewasMax Russo's   inner-thoughts of right and wrong that were brought intohumanform after Max performed a spell incorrectly. He claims to be what Max looks like to others, and dresses like Max, except with his shirt buttoned up and with a tie.  He and Max have a comical relationship which revolves around Max not being able to understand what Conscience is teaching him, which has led to incidences such as Max releasingMonstersintoNew York City. He tutors Max and gets him ahead in hiswizardstudies. This makes Alex jealous, and she encourages Conscience to become more independent and leave Max for a while.  Being an extension of Max, leaving him for too long made them lose their mental connection causing Conscience to become his own person, with the result that Max can do only the wrong things.  Conscience then develops a physical form of a New Conscience of his own, but refuses to return to Max.  However, Alex and the New Conscience physically drag Conscience back into Max's presence, causing all aspects of Max Russo to be absorbed into his original being.

characters.name: Cragmont
characters.description: Spellcasting Cragmontwas an elderlywizardseen in the episode, "Justin's Back In". He seemed to be jealous ofJustinasProfessor Crumbskept bragging about him. He then fails all of the students in the delinquent class. WhenAlexfinds out, she uses magic to try to stop him, but it doesn't work because Cragmont then traps her in a waterfall.

characters.name: Crystals of Justice
characters.description: TheCrystals of Justiceare enchanted crystals that make them an independent panel of judges who have the authority to sentence those who have done wrong. They come across as wise and all-powerful beings that keep track of all sorts of problems regardingmagic. As transcendent beings, they have shown some abilities:
